column1: # LONE NIGHT — passive table
# Owner: Jane. One row per passive; lv1..lv8 are ABSOLUTE values at that level.
# kind=mult -> multiply the stat by the value. kind=add -> add it.
# '-' means the passive does not offer that level (only Revival, which caps at 2).
# Passives apply globally to every weapon. Max 6 passives carried, cap level 8.
# `note` IS PLAYER-FACING, like the one in weapons.tsv. upgrades.ts falls back to
# it whenever a level has no value of its own. Today the cap check means that
# never happens, so nothing leaks -- but it is a loaded gun and the weapons table
# already went off once. Player copy only. Engineering detail goes in `#` lines.
# might     +8% damage per level.        haste   multiplies cooldown DOWN.
# area      scales ax and ay.            swift   base move 20 wu/s (design.md §6).
# oil       base light radius 14 wu.     magnet  base pickup radius 12 wu (§6).
# armour    flat damage subtracted per hit; a hit always deals at least 1.
# luck      chest odds + gold odds + rare drop odds.
# revival   caps at level 2. The cap is enforced by passiveMaxLevel(), not by this note.
# ###  `note` IS THE CARD'S SENTENCE. BUDGET 36 CHARS, WORD-WRAPS TO TWO LINES OF 20. ###
# ###  `label` IS THE HUMAN NAME OF THE STAT, FOR THE CARD'S DIMMED NUMBERS LINE.      ###
# NEW COLUMN, 10.07: `label`, appended at index 13 so nothing else shifts.
# upgrades.ts builds the numbers line as `${def.stat.replace(/_/g,' ')} +8%`. That
# prints OUR VARIABLE NAMES to the player. Real cards, from a real hand:
#     [+] REGEN   NEW        [»] ARMOUR  NEW        [~] GROWTH  NEW
#         hp per sec +0.25       flat reduce +1         xp gain +6%
# `hp_per_sec`, `flat_reduce` and `xp_gain` are identifiers in John's StatName union.
# They are not English. This is the same disease the weapons table had (a player was
# once offered "ax = orbit radius, ay = hit radius") -- but here the string is
# GENERATED, so fixing the note column could never have caught it.
# John: read `label` instead of `stat.replace(...)`. Every level of every passive then
# fits the 20-column card at its widest (checked): "movement speed +40%" is 19, the
# longest in the game. Falls back to the old behaviour if the column is missing.
# id
might
haste
area
duration
swift
magnet
column13: Motes come to you from the dark.

column1: growth
luck
armour
regen
# Renamed 12.07 (design.md §15.15): was "Lantern Oil" / "The lantern burns
# brighter." — a continuity break post-pivot, since the player is a ship now,
# not someone carrying a physical lantern. `id` stays `oil` (internal, John's
# code reads it, not worth the coordination cost of renaming).
# Reframed 13.07 (design.md §16.5, owner: "this light mechanic is so
# pointless"): normal play is fully lit now; light_radius survives as SENSOR
# RANGE — it still gates how far out the Bat's charge tell renders, still
# widens the reactor's ember ring, and still widens your sight in the boss's
# Dusk blackout. Text below says sensors; the stat id is untouched.
oil
revival
column13: Death is refused. Once, then again.
